steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: In $K(v)=\frac{1}{2}(41)(v^2)$, the input $v$ is speed in meters per second, and the output $K(v)$ is kinetic energy in joules.

steps.title: Interpret K(0)=0
steps.content: $K(0)=0$ means that when $v=0$, the kinetic energy is $0$. In context, when the object is traveling at $0$ meters per second, its kinetic energy is $0$ joules.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: C states this interpretation. The other choices introduce mass or height as the input, but the input is speed.
